---
output: html_document
title: "Oversigt over fiskevand i Karup Å"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
knit: (function(inputFile, encoding) { 
      out_dir <- '../../docs/skjern';
      rmarkdown::render(inputFile,
                        encoding=encoding, 
                        output_file=file.path(dirname(inputFile), out_dir, 'skjern-kort.html')) })
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
library(riverdata)
```

<style>
  body {
      padding: 0 !important;
      margin: 0 !important;
  }
  .main-container {
    max-width: 4000px
  }
  .container-fluid {
      padding: 0 !important;
  }
  #header {
      display: none;
  }
</style>


```{r}
prefix <- "../../data/data_karup_"
snip_leaflet(prefix)
```
